channel.title: Devops on Nicole van der Hoeven
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on Nicole van der Hoeven

item.title: DevOps Culture from a Tester's Perspective (Adobo & Avocados #24)
item.description: We’ve all heard of DevOps, but what is DevOps from a tester’s perspective? How can we embrace this culture? In this episode of Adobo and Avocados, the one and only Lisa Crispin talks to my friend Marie Cruz and me about DevOps culture from a testing mindset, what holistic testing is really about, and her journey to being one of the well-respected voices in the testing community.

item.title: Quality Engineering, DevOps, and work-life balance (Adobo & Avocados #07)
item.description: Developer Advocates Marie Cruz and I talk to Katja Obring, an experienced Quality Engineering Coach, about her experience in tech and moving to freelance for better work-life balance. We also talk about her book, “Testing in DevOps: A Guide to Optimised Testing for Speedy and High Quality Delivery,” and how Testing fits in the overall DevOps landscape, the importance of automated testing, and the cultural changes crucial to DevOps.

item.title: TestOps Ask Me Anything on Devops Toolkit
item.description:
I joined my friend Viktor Farcic on his channel, DevOps Toolkit, to do an Ask Me Anything on the topic of TestOps.

We ended up talking a lot about k6.io, different Grafana Labs open-source projects, and what performance testing has to do with DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering.

item.title: How to Make Kubernetes Clusters Production Ready using Crossplane, with Viktor Farcic (k6 Office Hours #46)
item.description: In this video, Viktor Farcic, Paul Balogh and I talk about how to make Kubernetes clusters production-ready. Viktor is a Developer Advocate from Upbound, and he demonstrates a solution that ties together Crossplane, Grafana, Prometheus, and Loki to deploy and manage clusters in production.

item.title: Load Testing for DevOps with Victor Farcic (k6 Office Hours #45)
item.description:
How can you use load testing for DevOps? What kind of performance testing can or should be included in CI/CD pipelines? Viktor Farcic from Upbound and DevOps Toolkit join Nicole van der Hoeven and Paul Balogh to discuss how he sees k6 fitting into the daily duties of a DevOps engineer.

{{ youtube xUlNdsr6y_E }}
